ItacWorkItem.LongTitle: Il Neghittoso Accademico Spensierato. all`Illustrissimo Cardinal d`Este.
ItacWorkItem.Notes: The book contains a letter dated 16 April 1616 addressed to the printer Tommaso Baglioni. On the previous page one reads; `Girolamo Canini correggeva le stampe portategli a casa`. The first letter comments on the staging of Campeggi`s `Filarmindo`, while the second describes the staging of Campeggi`s `L`Aurora ingannata` on the occasion of the Riario-Pepoli wedding. The date of the second letter is fake.
ItacWorkItem.CensorsAgreement: Con privilegio e licenza de` superiori

Essay.EssayTitle: Al Signor Roberto Fontana a Modena

ItacWorkItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
